name: Ondo US Government Bond Fund
description: Tokenised exposure to a portfolio of short-duration US Treasuries managed by Ondo Finance. Restricted to qualified purchasers and accredited investors.
complianceObligations: Restricted to qualified purchasers and accredited investors; KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: Ondo US Dollar Yield
description: Yield-bearing note backed by short-term US Treasuries and bank demand deposits. Available to non-US investors with KYC.
complianceObligations: Available to non-US investors only; KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund
description: Onchain share of an SEC-registered USD money-market fund managed by BlackRock and tokenised via Securitize. Restricted to qualified purchasers.
complianceObligations: Restricted to qualified purchasers; KYC and anti-money laundering checks handled by Securitize.

name: Franklin OnChain US Government Money Fund
description: SEC-registered tokenised US government money-market fund. On-chain shareholder records on Stellar and Polygon are the system of record.
complianceObligations: KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: Superstate short-duration US Government Securities Fund
description: SEC-registered tokenised ultra-short-duration US government securities fund. Restricted to US accredited investors and qualified institutional buyers.
complianceObligations: Restricted to US accredited investors and qualified institutional buyers; KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: Superstate US Credit Obligations Fund
description: Tokenised investment-grade short-duration US corporate credit fund managed by Superstate.
complianceObligations: KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: OpenEden T-Bill vault
description: Tokenised vault providing on-chain exposure to short-term US Treasury bills. Issued by OpenEden under a Singapore MAS-regulated structure.
complianceObligations: KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: Matrixdock short-term Treasury bill
description: ERC-1400 security token representing exposure to short-term US Treasury bills. Issued by Matrixdock for non-US accredited investors.
complianceObligations: KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: Circle USYC
description: Yield-bearing token backed by short-duration US Treasuries and reverse repos. Originally issued by Hashnote; acquired by Circle in January 2025.
complianceObligations: Restricted to institutional and accredited investors; KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: Mountain Protocol USD
description: Bermuda-regulated yield-bearing stablecoin backed by short-term US Treasuries. Distributes daily yield via rebasing.
complianceObligations: Available to non-US investors only; KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: Ethena USDtb
description: Stablecoin issued by Ethena backed primarily by BlackRock's BUIDL fund. Designed as a non-yield-bearing reserve asset distinct from Ethena's USDe.
complianceObligations: This token is permissionless; no KYC or anti-money laundering checks are required.

name: Anemoy Janus Henderson Treasury Fund
description: BVI-regulated tokenised US Treasury bill fund managed by Janus Henderson and tokenised by Anemoy on Centrifuge.
complianceObligations: Available to non-US investors only; KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: WisdomTree Government Money Market Digital Fund
description: SEC-registered tokenised US government money-market fund. Investor records are kept on-chain via WisdomTree Prime.
complianceObligations: KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: PAX Gold
description: ERC-20 token backed 1:1 by one fine troy ounce of LBMA Good Delivery gold held in Brink's vaults under the Paxos Trust Company.
complianceObligations: KYC and anti-money laundering checks required for large redemptions.

name: Tether Gold
description: Token backed by physical gold held in Swiss vaults. Each XAUT represents one fine troy ounce of allocated gold.
complianceObligations: This token is permissionless; no KYC or anti-money laundering checks are required.

name: CACHE gold
description: ERC-20 token where each unit represents one gram of allocated physical gold stored in LBMA-approved Singapore vaults.
complianceObligations: This token is permissionless; no KYC or anti-money laundering checks are required.

name: WisdomTree physical gold
description: Token backed by physical gold held in JPMorgan custody under WisdomTree's regulated ETP structure.
complianceObligations: KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: WisdomTree physical silver
description: Token backed by physical silver held in institutional custody under WisdomTree's regulated ETP structure.
complianceObligations: KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: Base Carbon Tonne
description: ERC-20 representing one tonne of CO2-equivalent Verra Verified Carbon Standard credits bridged on-chain by Toucan Protocol.
complianceObligations: This token is permissionless; no KYC or anti-money laundering checks are required.

name: Nature Carbon Tonne
description: ERC-20 backed by post-2012 nature-based Verra VCS carbon credits with stricter eligibility filters than BCT.
complianceObligations: This token is permissionless; no KYC or anti-money laundering checks are required.
backedBy: Post-2012 Verra VCS nature carbon credits

name: Moss carbon credit
description: ERC-20 representing certified Amazonian REDD+ carbon credits. Each token represents one tonne of CO2-equivalent.
complianceObligations: This token is permissionless; no KYC or anti-money laundering checks are required.

name: RealT property token
description: Per-property ERC-20 representing fractional ownership in a US single-family or multi-unit rental held by a RealT LLC special-purpose vehicle.
complianceObligations: KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: Landshare real estate token
description: BEP-20 token backed by a portfolio of US residential properties held in Landshare LLC SPVs.
complianceObligations: This token is permissionless; no KYC or anti-money laundering checks are required.

name: Real USD
description: Historical stablecoin issued by Tangible on Polygon, partially backed by tokenised UK and European real estate. Depegged in October 2023 and entered wind-down; included for historical record.
complianceObligations: This token is permissionless; no KYC or anti-money laundering checks are required.

name: Lofty property token
description: Algorand ASA per property representing fractional ownership of US residential rentals held in Lofty LLC SPVs.
complianceObligations: This token is permissionless; no KYC or anti-money laundering checks are required.

name: Figure HELOC

name: Goldfinch Senior Pool
description: ERC-20 representing a proportional share of the Goldfinch Senior Pool, which finances diversified emerging-market FinTech credit.

name: Centrifuge senior tranche
description: ERC-20 senior tranche token (with permissioning hooks) for Centrifuge real-world credit pools. Holds first claim on pool repayments after fees.
complianceObligations: KYC and anti-money laundering checks required; specific obligations vary by pool.

name: Apollo Diversified Credit Securitize Fund
description: Tokenised feeder share of Apollo's Diversified Credit Fund, available to accredited investors via Securitize.
complianceObligations: Restricted to accredited investors; KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: Hamilton Lane Senior Credit Opportunities Fund
description: Tokenised feeder share of Hamilton Lane's senior secured credit fund, distributed via Securitize.
complianceObligations: Restricted to accredited investors; KYC and anti-money laundering checks required.

name: Maple Syrup USDC
description: Yield-bearing vault token representing a share of Maple Finance's USDC pool, generating yield from institutional unsecured lending.

name: Maple Syrup USDT
description: USDT-denominated equivalent of Maple's syrupUSDC vault, providing institutional unsecured lending yield in USDT.

name: Clearpool single-borrower pool
description: ERC-20 pool token issued per Clearpool single-borrower lending pool. Each pool represents an institutional borrower's drawn credit facility.

name: TrueFi structured credit
description: ERC-20 structured credit note issued via TrueFi's credit marketplace for institutional unsecured borrowers.
complianceObligations: Open permissionlessly to lenders; institutional borrowers are KYC and anti-money laundering verified.
